'''gawongo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:wuxing|wuxing]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-w-ng
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:wuxing|wuxing]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| gawongo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:gæwengeth|gæwengeth]] || [[word:gæwengej|gæwengej]] || [[word:gæwengesh|gæwengesh]] || [[word:gæwenge|gæwenge]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:gawowongoth|gawowongoth]] || [[word:gawowongoj|gawowongoj]] || [[word:gawowongosh|gawowongosh]] || [[word:gawowongo|gawowongo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:gawongoth|gawongoth]] || [[word:gawongoj|gawongoj]] || [[word:gawongosh|gawongosh]] || [[word:gawongo|gawongo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:gawofngoth|gawofngoth]] || [[word:gawofngoj|gawofngoj]] || [[word:gawofngosh|gawofngosh]] || [[word:gawofngof|gawofngof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:gawongotho|gawongotho]] || [[word:gawongojo|gawongojo]] || [[word:gawongosho|gawongosho]] || [[word:gawongoko|gawongoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:gawongoth|gawongoth]] || [[word:gawongoj|gawongoj]] || [[word:gawongosh|gawongosh]] || [[word:gawongo|gawongo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:gawongothol|gawongothol]] || [[word:gawongojol|gawongojol]] || [[word:gawongoshol|gawongoshol]] || [[word:gawongokol|gawongokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:gawongothotho|gawongothotho]] || [[word:gawongojojo|gawongojojo]] || [[word:gawongoshosho|gawongoshosho]] || [[word:gawongoko|gawongoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:gawongothon|gawongothon]] || [[word:gawongojon|gawongojon]] || [[word:gawongoshon|gawongoshon]] || [[word:gawongokon|gawongokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:gawongothoro|gawongothoro]] || [[word:gawongojoro|gawongojoro]] || [[word:gawongoshoro|gawongoshoro]] || [[word:gawongokoro|gawongokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|4a6dc77}}
